slots.caption_ig:
AVPN-certified means the pizza is made by a Naples-trained pizzaiolo, in a wood-burning oven over 900°F, with San Marzano tomatoes, in 60-90 seconds. There are ~12 AVPN-certified spots in the Bay. We've scored all of them.

#ForkFox #Pizza #BayAreaEats #FoodAI #DishNotRestaurant
slots.caption_fb: AVPN — Associazione Verace Pizza Napoletana — is the Neapolitan pizza body that certifies which spots make pizza the actual Naples way. Wood oven over 900°F, San Marzano tomatoes, 60-90 second bake, specific dough hydration. Ask ForkFox 'AVPN pizza near me' and the answer is exact.
slots.image_gen_prompt: A Neapolitan pizza pulled from a wood-fired oven, edge of the dome glowing. Editorial cinematic lighting. Soft smoke. 1080x1080.
slots.video_gen_prompt: Vertical 9:16, 8s. Wood-fired pizza oven, pizza going in. Temperature gauge ticks up to 950°F. 60-second timer. Pizza comes out, perfect leoparding. Text: 'AVPN-certified means this.'
